CoworkingActiveTariffListItemResponse.description: Lightweight representation of an active coworking tariff, used in list views

id.description: External unique identifier of the active tariff

daysUsed.description: Number of days the tariff has already been used

dateStart.description: Date and time when the tariff became active (ISO-8601, UTC)

dateEnd.description: Date and time when the tariff expires (ISO-8601, UTC)

CoworkingActiveTariffResponse.description: Detailed representation of an active coworking tariff, including guest and tariff references

id.description: External unique identifier of the active tariff

guestId.description: External unique identifier of the guest this active tariff belongs to

daysUsed.description: Number of days the tariff has already been used

dateStart.description: Date and time when the tariff became active (ISO-8601, UTC)

dateEnd.description: Date and time when the tariff expires (ISO-8601, UTC)

tariffId.description: External unique identifier of the underlying tariff definition

CoworkingGuestResponse.description: Coworking guest details including personal and contact information

id.description: External unique identifier of the guest

phone.description: Guest's phone number in international format

CoworkingMeetingRoomBookingResponse.description: Meeting room booking details, including the guest who made the booking and the reserved time slot

id.description: External unique identifier of the meeting room booking

guestId.description: External unique identifier of the guest who made the booking

dateStart.description: Date and time when the booking starts (ISO-8601, UTC)

dateEnd.description: Date and time when the booking ends (ISO-8601, UTC). Must be later than dateStart.

persons.description: Number of people expected to attend the meeting

comment.description: Optional free-text comment or note about the booking (e.g. agenda, special requirements)

CoworkingNotificationResponse.description: Coworking notification details including the message content and the time it was sent

id.description: External unique identifier of the notification

examples: Your booking for meeting room A at 10:00 starts in 15 minutes

sentAt.description: Date and time when the notification was sent (ISO-8601, UTC)

CoworkingTariffResponse.description: Coworking tariff details including price and included services

id.description: External unique identifier of the tariff

price.description: Tariff price in the base currency (e.g. RUB), as a whole number

meetingRoom.description: Meeting room access description or allowance included in the tariff (e.g. 'Unlimited', '2 hours per day', 'Not included')

fixedDesk.description: Whether a fixed (dedicated) desk is included in the tariff

filterCoffeeAndTea.description: Whether complimentary filter coffee and tea are included in the tariff

printoutScan.description: Whether printing and scanning services are included in the tariff

luggageStorage.description: Whether luggage storage is available with this tariff

CreateCoworkingGuestRequest.description: Payload for creating a new coworking guest. All fields are required.

firstName.description: Guest's first name. Must be a non-blank string.

lastName.description: Guest's last name. Must be a non-blank string.

telegram.description: Guest's Telegram username (without the @ prefix). Must be a non-blank string.

phone.description: Guest's phone number in international format. Must be a non-blank string.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by the API when a request fails. Contains a machine-readable error code, a human-readable message, and optional context details.

code.description: Machine-readable error code identifying the failure type. Typically a stable, uppercase string that clients can branch on.

examples: One or more fields failed validation
message.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong. Intended for display to the end user or for logging.

details.description: Optional map with additional context about the error. Structure depends on the error code — for validation errors it may contain field-level violations, for not-found errors it may contain the requested identifier, and so on.

EventNotificationResponse.description: Event notification configuration, defining when and what message should be sent ahead of an event

id.description: Unique identifier of the event notification

leadHours.description: Number of hours before the event at which the notification should be sent

examples: Reminder: your coworking tariff expires tomorrow
message.description: Notification message text to be delivered to the recipient

active.description: Whether this notification configuration is currently active. Inactive notifications are kept for history but will not be sent.

EventRegistrationCreateRequest.description: Payload for registering a guest to an event. Identifies the event and guest, and captures attendance details such as group size and optional comment.

eventId.description: External unique identifier of the event to register for

guestId.description: External unique identifier of the guest being registered

guestComment.description: Optional free-text comment from the guest (e.g. dietary restrictions, accessibility needs, questions)

guestCount.description: Total number of people attending under this registration, including the guest themselves. Must be at least 1.

source.description: Optional source channel that initiated the registration (e.g. 'website', 'mobile-app', 'telegram-bot'). Used for analytics and attribution.

EventRegistrationResponse.description: Event registration details, linking a guest to an event and recording their attendance information

id.description: Unique identifier of the event registration

eventId.description: Identifier of the event the guest is registered for

guestId.description: Identifier of the guest who registered for the event

guestComment.description: Optional free-text comment from the guest (e.g. dietary restrictions, accessibility needs, questions)

guestCount.description: Total number of people attending under this registration, including the guest themselves

EventResponse.description: Event details including schedule, registration links, and notification configuration

id.description: External unique identifier of the event

dateStart.description: Date and time when the event starts, as a string in the format defined by the source system (typically ISO-8601)

dateEnd.description: Date and time when the event ends, as a string in the format defined by the source system (typically ISO-8601). Must be later than dateStart.

examples: An evening of pitches from emerging startups, followed by networking drinks.
description.description: Free-text description of the event, may contain plain text or formatted content

externalRegistrationUrl.description: External URL for event registration on a third-party platform (e.g. Timepad, Eventbrite). Used when registration is handled outside this system.

registrationUrl.description: Internal registration URL within this system

instagramUrl.description: Link to the event's Instagram post or story

showForm.description: Whether the internal registration form should be shown to users. When false, users are expected to register via externalRegistrationUrl.

notifications.description: List of notification identifiers configured for this event. Each identifier references an EventNotificationResponse and defines when a reminder should be sent.

examples: Need to confirm catering by May 1
comment.description: Internal comment or note about the event, not intended for public display

showEvent.description: List of channels or contexts where this event should be displayed (e.g. 'website', 'mobile-app', 'telegram-bot')

EventTypeResponse.description: Event type definition (e.g. 'meetup', 'workshop') with its display color for UI rendering

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the event type

value.description: Human-readable name of the event type (e.g. 'meetup', 'workshop', 'conference')

color.description: Color associated with the event type, used for visual differentiation in the UI. Typically a CSS color name or hex code.

UpdateCoworkingGuestRequest.description: Payload for updating an existing coworking guest. The 'telegram' field is optional; if omitted, the current value is kept.

firstName.description: Guest's first name. Must be a non-blank string.

lastName.description: Guest's last name. Must be a non-blank string.

phone.description: Guest's phone number in international format. Must be a non-blank string.

telegram.description: Guest's Telegram username (without the @ prefix). Optional — if omitted, the current value is preserved.

info.description: REST API for working with coworking and events through Baserow
info.title: LAN Baserow API

tags.name: Coworking Active Tariffs
tags.description: Manage active coworking tariffs: retrieve the list of currently active tariffs or fetch detailed information about a specific one

tags.name: Coworking Guests
tags.description: Manage coworking guests: fetch guest details, create new guests, and update existing ones

tags.name: Coworking Meeting Room Bookings
tags.description: Manage meeting room bookings: fetch booking details, create new bookings, and update existing ones

tags.name: Coworking Notifications
tags.description: Manage coworking notifications: retrieve the list of notifications available to the current user

tags.name: Coworking Tariffs
tags.description: Manage coworking tariffs: retrieve the full list or fetch a single tariff by its identifier

tags.name: Secured
tags.description: Diagnostic endpoints for verifying authentication and authorization behavior

get.description: Returns a lightweight list of all currently active coworking tariffs. Each item contains only the fields required for list views. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

get.summary: Get an active coworking tariff by its identifier
get.description: Returns the full detailed representation of an active coworking tariff identified by its external UUID. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the active tariff (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

200.description: Active tariff found and returned successfully

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Active tariff with the given externalId was not found

post.description: Creates a new coworking guest with the provided personal and contact information. Returns the created guest together with a Location header pointing to the new resource. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

Location.description: URI of the newly created guest resource

400.description: Request body validation failed (missing or invalid fields)

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

409.description: A guest with the same unique attributes (e.g. phone or telegram) already exists

patch.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing coworking guest. Only the fields provided in the request body will be changed; omitted fields remain untouched. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the guest to update (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Omitted fields will not be changed.

400.description: Request body validation failed (invalid field values)

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Guest with the given externalId was not found

409.description: Update conflicts with an existing guest (e.g. duplicate phone or telegram)

get.summary: Get a coworking guest by its identifier
get.description: Returns detailed information about a coworking guest identified by their external UUID. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the guest (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Guest with the given externalId was not found

post.summary: Create a new meeting room booking
post.description: Creates a new meeting room booking for the given time slot and guest. Returns the created booking together with a Location header pointing to the new resource. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

Location.description: URI of the newly created booking resource

400.description: Request body validation failed (missing or invalid fields, e.g. end date before start date)

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Referenced entity (e.g. guest or meeting room) was not found

409.description: The requested time slot conflicts with an existing booking

patch.summary: Partially update a meeting room booking
patch.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing meeting room booking. Only the fields provided in the request body will be changed; omitted fields remain untouched. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the booking to update (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Omitted fields will not be changed.

400.description: Request body validation failed (invalid field values)

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Booking with the given externalId was not found

409.description: The updated time slot conflicts with an existing booking

get.summary: Get a meeting room booking by its identifier
get.description: Returns detailed information about a meeting room booking identified by its external UUID. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the meeting room booking (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Booking with the given externalId was not found

get.description: Returns the full list of coworking notifications. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

get.description: Returns the full list of available coworking tariffs. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

get.summary: Get a coworking tariff by its identifier
get.description: Returns detailed information about a coworking tariff identified by its external UUID. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

parameters.description: External unique identifier of the tariff (UUID)
parameters.name: externalId

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource

404.description: Tariff with the given externalId was not found

get.description: Returns a static 'public ok' response. Accessible to anyone — no authentication required. Useful for verifying that the service is reachable.

Returns a greeting containing the authenticated user's name and the list of their groups extracted from the JWT. Useful for verifying that the Bearer token is parsed correctly and that the caller has the expected roles. Accessible to users with the 'admin' or 'web-users' role.

403.description: User does not have permission to access this resource
